tools.name: context_engine_search
tools.description: Semantic search across the indexed Context Engine skill chunks. Returns ranked chunks with skill id, section, text, and relevance score. Use this to pull just the relevant context for the question at hand instead of preloading entire skills.

limit.description: Maximum chunks to return. Default 10, max 50.

tools.name: context_engine_list_skills
tools.description: List all skills discovered by Context Engine, with id, name, category, description, triggers, and active state. Use this to understand what context is available before issuing targeted searches or fetches.

activeOnly.description: If true, return only skills currently toggled active. Default false.

tools.name: context_engine_get_skill
tools.description: Fetch the full body of a single skill by id. Pass a section heading to return just that ## section instead of the whole file. Use this after a search or list call has narrowed the candidates.

section.description: Optional ## section heading. Returns full body when omitted.

tools.name: context_engine_status
tools.description: Report the Context Engine vector index status: chunk count, indexed skill count, embedding model, and last-indexed timestamp. Use this to detect a stale or unbuilt index before searching.

tools.name: context_engine_handoffs
tools.description: List active handoffs — in-flight thread state bookmarks recorded by Context Engine. Use this at the start of a session to resume a conversation thread instead of re-deriving context. Includes a bounded commit timeline for repo-bound handoffs. Optional filters by repo (project handoffs) or thread_tag (named threads).

repo.description: Filter to handoffs bound to this repo path.

thread_tag.description: Filter to handoffs bound to this thread tag.

tools.name: context_engine_sync_project_handoff
tools.description: Sync a host-written project handoff from <repo>/.context-engine/handoff.md into Context Engine's managed handoff store. Use this after writing or updating a project checkpoint file from an LLM host.

repo.description: Absolute path to the project directory containing .context-engine/handoff.md.
